name: Plato Income Maximiser Limited.
analysis: PL8's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3850, stop A$1.3460, target A$1.5245 (3.58:1) — then trail it.
